query: INSERT INTO drawings (id, user_id, client_uuid, version, is_deleted, last_modified, sync_state, created_at, data) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7::text::sync_state, $8, $9) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET client_uuid = EXCLUDED.client_uuid, version = EXCLUDED.version, is_deleted = EXCLUDED.is_deleted, last_modified = EXCLUDED.last_modified, sync_state = EXCLUDED.sync_state, data = EXCLUDED.data
